component.name: Platterpus
component.summary: A secure, EAC-style CD ripper for Linux (FLAC, WAV, WavPack, MP3)

description.p: Platterpus is a Linux GUI for ripping audio CDs to a verifiable, archival-quality master, aiming for the same bit-perfect standard as Exact Audio Copy (EAC) on Windows. It drives the cyanrip ripping backend, identifies discs through MusicBrainz, embeds cover art from the Cover Art Archive, and proves every rip with AccurateRip and CUETools Database (CTDB) verification.

ul.li: Secure, EAC-equivalent extraction with read-offset calibration
FLAC (lossless archival master), plus WavPack, MP3, and WAV outputs
AccurateRip v1/v2 and CTDB verification, shown as an at-a-glance verdict
MusicBrainz tagging and embedded cover art
